record.field: today = datetime.datetime.today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d') last_month = (datetime.datetime.today() - datetime.timedelta(days=30)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d') rec = env['account.move'].search([('date', '<=', today), ('date', '>=', last_month), ('move_type', '=', 'in_invoice')]) model.get_xml_content(rec)
